function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap order (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected /99_system before task work, and used canonical cast entity file for identity and birthday.
function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-30. Birthday scan in 10_entities/cast showed the next upcoming month-day is 05-21; canonical file 10_entities/cast/tobias.md identifies that person as Tobias Kern. A direct cast search for 05-21 returned only tobias.md, so no tie exists.
